prompt: A high-quality, professional portrait photo of a beautiful young South Asian woman with long, silky black hair styled in soft waves and natural, elegant makeup. She is wearing a fitted dark grey polo t-shirt, stylish grey denim jeans, and fashionable white sneakers featuring black graphic text patterns on them. The background is a unique, immersive white tunnel-like space completely covered in bold, black hand-painted typography or graffiti text that reads "LEARN. DO. REPEAT." wrapping around the walls and flooring in a circular, spiraling pattern. Wide-angle shot, sharp focus, cinematic studio lighting with soft shadows, creating a deep 3D perspective effect. Hyper-realistic details on clothing texture, facial features, flowing hair, and the typography on the walls. Professional fashion photography, modern minimalist aesthetic, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, magazine-quality portrait, confident and inspiring atmosphere.
